candidate_llm_application: LLM watermark co-evolution: limited bit-budget watermarks must remain distinguishable under adversarial removal; competing watermarkers co-evolve.

results.title: Llm Watermarking / Adversarial Removal: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on LLM watermarking / adversarial removal, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (LLM watermarking / adversarial removal); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (vexillology terms vs LLM terms).
